subject: A bright green luminous ooze surging through a stone alley, with a humanoid figure falling or cowering as it overtakes them
description: A large mass of vivid translucent green slime erupts from the left side of the frame, flowing across a cobblestone alley toward a humanoid figure at right who is stumbling or falling backward. The ooze is rendered with glowing bright lime-green and yellow-green tones, semi-transparent with tendrils and blobs extending outward. The figure, dressed in brown clothing, is caught in the path of the ooze and appears to be retreating or falling. The setting is a narrow alley between stone and wooden buildings, with a wooden door frame at left and rough stone walls. The daylight palette is muted beige and brown against the vivid green of the creature.
foreground: green luminous ooze engulfing cobblestone alley
